text: MNC mein login karte hi bank se low balance ka alert aaya aur main wahi rone laga, kyunki Papa ki kirana shop doobne ke baad medical bill ne meri saari savings khatam kar di hain. Itna darr lag raha hai ki main code ki ek line nahi padh pa raha hoon, bas neighborhood shame aur log kya kahenge wahi dimaag mein ghoom raha hai. Is waqt main solution nahi dhoond sakta, bas ek gehra sadma aur panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

WFH isolation mein akele baith kar jab maine hospital ka final bill dekha, toh mere haath-paanv thande pad gaye aur main bas sunn hokar screen ko takta raha. Papa ki dukaan ke debt spiral aur upar se ye karcha dekh kar mujhe lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega. Main logically kuch nahi soch pa raha ki EMI kaise bharunga, bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah beh gaya hoon.

Startup mein layoff ka darr pehle se hi tha, aur aaj is medical bill ne meri bachi-kuchi himmat bhi tod di hai, main bas rone ka control nahi kar pa raha. Neighborhood mein sabko lagta tha ki shehar jaakar main bada aadmi ban gaya hoon, par ab is nakami ke bojh mein mujhe bas maut dikh rahi hai. Is waqt career ya backup plan dimaag mein nahi aa raha, bas ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe sunn kar raha hai.

Tier-2 city ke is ghar mein baith kar main bas ye soch kar roye ja raha hoon ki main apne parivaar ki 'izzat' nahi bacha paya. Kirana shop ke loss ke baad medical bill ne humein sadak par la diya hai aur mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Main koi strategy ya financial planning nahi kar sakta, bas ek extreme guilt aur breakdown mehsus ho raha hai jisme saans lena bhi bhari hai.

Sarkari naukri toh mili nahi, aur ab is private job ki salary aane se pehle hi hospital bills mein chali gayi, main poori tarah toot chuka hoon. Dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai aur bas wahi loan installments ki chinta mujhe flood kar rahi hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai jisne mujhe jhakad liya hai aur main bas rona chahta hoon.
